parsed_output.reasoning_summary: Low uplift yields a 90‑month payback, exceeding the 12‑month requirement; high uplift achieves ~6.9‑month payback, meeting the requirement. Approval is conditional on achieving at least the high uplift scenario.
key_assumptions: Revenue uplift of 4‑7% is realized immediately after go‑live and sustained monthly.
Gross margin remains constant at 40% and operating costs stay at $30,000 per month.
